old_column.content: "description": "The ids of the elements in the slider. Useful for composition."

new_column.content: "description": "The ids of the elements in the slider. Useful for composition."

old_column.content:
"description": "The minimum permitted steps between multiple thumbs.

`minStepsBetweenThumbs` * `step` should reflect the gap between the thumbs.

- `step: 1` and `minStepsBetweenThumbs: 10` => gap is `10`
- `step: 10` and `minStepsBetweenThumbs: 2` => gap is `20`"

new_column.content:
"description": "The minimum permitted steps between multiple thumbs.

`minStepsBetweenThumbs` * `step` should reflect the gap between the thumbs.

- `step: 1` and `minStepsBetweenThumbs: 10` => gap is `10`
- `step: 10` and `minStepsBetweenThumbs: 2` => gap is `20`"

old_column.content:
"description": "The origin of the slider range. The track is filled from the origin
to the thumb for single values.
- "start": Useful when the value represents an absolute value
- "center": Useful when the value represents an offset (relative)
- "end": Useful when the value represents an offset from the end"

new_column.content:
"description": "The origin of the slider range. The track is filled from the origin
to the thumb for single values.
- "start": Useful when the value represents an absolute value
- "center": Useful when the value represents an offset (relative)
- "end": Useful when the value represents an offset from the end"

old_column.content: "description": "The alignment of the slider thumb relative to the track\n- `center`: the thumb will extend beyond the bounds of the slider track.\n- `contain`: the thumb will be contained within the bounds of the track."

new_column.content: "description": "The alignment of the slider thumb relative to the track\n- `center`: the thumb will extend beyond the bounds of the slider track.\n- `contain`: the thumb will be contained within the bounds of the track."
